overall.description: First-person exploration of a vibrant cyberpunk city district featuring a mix of traditional Asian street markets and futuristic neon-lit skyscrapers. The camera moves smoothly through covered walkways, narrow alleys, and open plazas, encountering NPCs and a flying vehicle passing overhead.

elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a street corner with a prominent graffiti-covered wall on the right. The camera moves forward along a concrete sidewalk, passing construction barriers on the left, with an overhead pedestrian bridge visible in the distance against a backdrop of green urban buildings.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an outdoor cafe area with colorful umbrellas and white plastic seating. A futuristic flying drone suddenly descends and passes overhead, creating a smoke trail. The camera continues walking past patrons seated at tables while moving toward a more enclosed commercial area.

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered walkway illuminated by vibrant neon signs including a prominent 'LIVING BOOZE' sign. The space features concrete support pillars and overhead holographic advertisements. A child runs across the path, and patrons are visible seated at cafe tables under the sheltered arcade.

segments.scene_description: The environment narrows into an alleyway flanked by large concrete planters with trees. The walls feature extensive graffiti art. A man with distinctive green hair and red pants walks toward the camera, passing by in the confined space as the alley begins to open up ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with water feature and towering advertisements

approaching the water edge where the ground becomes flooded with steam rising

segments.scene_description: The alley opens dramatically into a vast urban plaza featuring a water feature with steam vents. Towering cyberpunk skyscrapers rise in the background, their facades covered in massive holographic advertisements. The camera approaches the water's edge, revealing a flooded section of the plaza with industrial elements and green safety railings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gritty urban street corner into a sprawling, high-tech cyberpunk plaza. It begins by moving along a concrete sidewalk past graffiti-covered walls and construction barriers, heading toward a distant pedestrian bridge. As the camera reaches an outdoor cafe with colorful umbrellas, a futuristic drone descends and streaks overhead, leading the viewer from the open air into a sheltered walkway illuminated by vibrant neon signs and holographic advertisements. The scene then narrows into a graffiti-lined alleyway where a man with green hair passes by, before the confined space dramatically opens up into a vast plaza. Finally, the camera approaches a steaming water feature and flooded industrial sections, framed by towering skyscrapers and massive holographic displays that dominate the skyline.
